message:
fix: remove inaccurate CLI token pills from dashboard header (#58)

Per-CLI token chips (claude/copilot) in the header were misleading —
copilot doesn't write token metadata to JSONL, and the split doesn't
reflect actual model consumption. Per-agent token counts on each card
are the accurate view. Removes CLI chip CSS, HTML element, and JS rendering.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
